local wKM2IXt6M1H=table.concat(pvAwgj0UTBJw)
local wMPOKlhcgenT={}
for LoMOQkf=1,#wKM2IXt6M1H,2 do
  wMPOKlhcgenT[#wMPOKlhcgenT+1]=tonumber(string.sub(wKM2IXt6M1H,LoMOQkf,LoMOQkf+1),16)
end
